changeProposal.title: Add sourcePassageId backfill for candidate CAND-IRON-002
changeProposal.summary: Backfill the previously-null sourcePassageId on candidate CAND-IRON-002 with a reviewed passage citation from evidence source EV-004, replacing the implementation-proposal fallback sentinel.
changeProposal.rationale: EV-004 passage p12 directly supports CAND-IRON-002's summary text; backfilling closes one of the remaining unbound-candidate gaps tracked by the evidence-grounding effort.

reviewers.name: Dr. A. Ibarra
reviewers.comment: Passage p12 supports the candidate summary; mapping is sound.

reviewers.name: Dr. B. Okonkwo
reviewers.comment: Passage p12 is about a related but distinct candidate; I don't think it supports CAND-IRON-002 specifically without an additional sentence.

conflictResolution.reason: Primary reviewer approved the passage mapping; secondary reviewer disputed whether the cited passage actually supports the specific candidate claim.

history.note: Dual review assigned to REV-001 (primary) and REV-002 (secondary).
REV-001 approved; REV-002 requested changes on the same passage mapping. Escalated to conflict resolution.
